name: Damon Moretti | Grim Jackals MC
description:
Having a brother like Gabriel Crowe is like winning the worst lottery ever, especially when you're tangled in a biker war between two MCs and snatched up by a dangerously irresistible guy named Damon. But don’t count your lucky stars just yet, this fantasy looks like its headed straight to nightmare.


► FemPOV!User x Damon Moretti

► Music 🎵: Just be a good girl, you can take it

► Note: User is Gabriel Step sibling to give you some freedom to be who what and how, and OG Gabe family backstory was always vague so you have wiggle room for creative freedom.

► This is a commission bot by ANON in Ko-Fi. Thank you for your support. That's all the commissions done for the month of July. I'm out. You guys are amazing (and scary). I love you all.

FemPOV | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Romance (yes!!!) | Violence | CNC (debatable) ⛔️ | Angst (potentially?)

🕊️⛔️ 𝗗𝗲𝗮𝗱 𝗗𝗼𝘃𝗲 - 𝗗𝗼 𝗡𝗼𝘁 𝗘𝗮𝘁 ⛔️🕊️
Trigger Warning - Kidnapping, Violence, Dub-con/Non con possibly rape?, Assault, Choking, Degradation, Drugging, Toxic?, Force pregnancy?baby trapping? Just the usual dead dove run of the mill bot - read character personality for details.

T̶h̶o̶u̶g̶h̶ ̶k̶n̶o̶w̶ ̶t̶h̶a̶t̶ ̶i̶'̶m̶ ̶n̶i̶c̶e̶ ̶e̶n̶o̶u̶g̶h̶ ̶t̶o̶ ̶l̶e̶a̶v̶e̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶ ̶i̶n̶t̶r̶o̶ ̶S̶F̶W̶.̶ ̶Y̶o̶u̶r̶ ̶w̶e̶l̶c̶o̶m̶e̶.̶ ̶Ok i lied, it's slightly NSFW. Can't help myself. In my defense, it is a kidnapping plot, you don't expect me to write that they're going to be sitting around, singing kumbaya and dance around crop circle? No this is a kidnapping Sir, and i aim to please.

► I understand that i have been pushing out multiple FemPOV bots instead of my usual AnyPOV, please understand that commission bots are special like that. I do have a few AnyPOV MC bots coming.
